ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facility" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_size" REAL /* Size of the facility in square feet or square meters */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of the facility (e.g., commercial, industrial) */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., LEED, ENERGY STAR) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_subsystems" (
  "subsystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsystem */,
  "subsystem_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsystem */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subsystem */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the subsystem was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the subsystem (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the energy source (e.g., Electricity, Gas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy source was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the energy source (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy source (e.g., 90%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, energy auditor, maintenance staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, user, viewer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
